Name: FEditableTextStyle
Description: Represents the appearance of an SEditableText

Variables.Name: Font
Variables.Description: Font family and size to be used when displaying this text.

Variables.Name: ColorAndOpacity
Variables.Description: The color and opacity of this text

Variables.Name: BackgroundImageSelected
Variables.Description: Background image for the selected text

Variables.Name: BackgroundImageComposing
Variables.Description: Background image for the selected text

Variables.Name: CaretImage
Variables.Description: Image brush used for the caret
